sugar_content.concern: 8g added sugars per serving = 16% daily value
sugar_content.context: Typical for fruit preserves; natural fruit-based sugars
sugar_content.recommendation: Market as natural fruit sugars; suggest portion control for sugar-sensitive diets

fiber_content.context: Typical for processed jams; fiber removed during cooking/processing
fiber_content.recommendation: Position as 'spreadable fruit concentrate' rather than health food

nutritional_assessment.macronutrient_profile: Pure carbohydrate source (simple sugars from fruit + cane sugar)

key_selling_points: 100% real fruit - no artificial flavors or colors
Light spread: only 35 calories per serving
Naturally suitable for vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free diets

flavor_specific_angles.Apricot: Golden apricots, warm sunny flavor - nostalgic breakfast appeal
flavor_specific_angles.Strawberry: Bright berries, classic flavor - mass market appeal
flavor_specific_angles.Raspberry: Tart and vibrant - premium, sophisticated angle
flavor_specific_angles.Apple: Smooth, mellow sweetness - comfort food positioning
flavor_specific_angles.Quince: Rare, aromatic with cinnamon spice - specialty/luxury angle

audience_segments.health_conscious: Light spread option, 35 cal/serving, real fruit

warnings_and_notes.message: All flavors contain 8g added sugars per serving (16% DV). Disclose clearly; market as natural fruit sugars; suggest serving size.
warnings_and_notes.impact: IMPORTANT for transparent labeling and trust

warnings_and_notes.message: No dietary fiber (typical for processed jams). Do not position as health/wellness product.
Consider certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Organic (if applicable), Vegan (explicit validation), Kosher/Halal (if targeting those markets)

certification_checklist.requirement: No animal products - confirm with certifying body
No animal products or byproducts - confirm cane sugar sourcing
No gluten-containing ingredients - confirm cross-contamination controls
Verify fruit and cane sugar sources are non-GMO
Only if all ingredients (fruit, sugar, lemon juice) are certified organic
Cane sugar and other ingredients must be certified; processing equipment verified
Ingredient sourcing and processing must meet Halal standards
